item.title: Psylocke - Xmen Cosplay
item.description: Me as Psylocke! This is def one of my new favorite cosplays! Put a lot of work into combining that body suit with a corset so it properly fit and kept the shape I wanted... Also, think this counts for T.H.T as well :P

item.title: Accurate
item.description: Even when the shooters leave behind white power manifestos, the christian-right bury their heads in the sand and look for any reason, other than their own rhetoric, that could be responsible. Fuck the GOP.
item.dc:creator: jrabbitmusic

item.title: Anita Alvarez being rescued by her coach Andrea Fuentes
item.dc:creator: bananaforscale6360

item.title: Exhausted
item.description: It’s only five miles too work, (10 total). I thought it would be a piece of cake. 5 miles running to work sounds like death on a stick. Biking to work, sounded easy. It’s not. Not at all. Feels like I’m always riding up hill both ways. On a different note, I’ve been keeping track of how many calories I burn per ride. Burned 242! Genuinely impressed how efficient our body’s are at supplying us with energy. However to anyone who wants to lose weight that must suck that we burn so little with so much effort. Edit: most viral!? Oh I’m so happy! Thanks guys, day just got so much better! Send whatever you like. Kisses!
item.dc:creator: DogHeadHunter

item.dc:creator: PukeB

item.title: The Return of the Meme (vol. 556)
item.description:
It's another day here in the high desert, and I seem to have once again survived the night to be the world's problem once more. Let's get this Naan. Oh, and yeah, I chose the dinosaur. Duh.
Fascinating, captain.
Lies. Jesus would be in an Accord. It says so within the Biblical text.
Yup.
These guys do wander often.
A very strange example of convergent evolution.
Awwww yeah baby.
Seems a bit corny.
Pfft, that's just Steven Stills.
BIG RED FLAG. If you don't have a favorite dinosaur, I'm not interested. My last ex, the one who practically destroyed me and then left me to pick up the pieces, thought that dinosaurs were boring. I should have broke up with her when she said that. But she was hot and I was an idiot  ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
I want a Viking drakkar and I'd sail it through Lake Powell, and we'd raid houseboats and randomly start parties.
Just Arizona things.
Mood.
Nom nom nom
Lisa Frank.
The golden rule.
Mood.
Finally it has been brought down to size.
I'd love to see a Cambrian Aquarium.
Why not all of them?
"And thus began the fall of man"
Yeah.
And so it did.
And I love both.
Mood.
Just another Ea-Nasir meme
Pippin doesn't really have a flip-off-everything attitude though.
Hahahaha
Yup.
My oldest companion.
Me, some days.
I'd "watch" the documentary.
I honestly have never heard any complaints.
Yeah what the heck is this shit?
Yes, yes it does.
This shallow angle of subduction helped to create the rockies, basin and range crustal extension, and was responsible for the wave of giant volcanic eruptions that occurred between 25-15 million years ago. Cool stuff.
Just Dinosaur Things.
Indeed. It all is.
They do have that same font. Could be fun to do a wine label with that font...
I'm fond of maps like this.
Do not feed the bears. Unless, uh, that's your thing.
That's one way to exorcize a demon.
Pretty much.
The middle ages were stranger than we think.
Ah crap I hate when this happens.
The dream.
It's my life.
This pretty much describes my work approach as well. As well as "malicious compliance"
Such cute.
Pippin tax! Stay alive. The struggle is worth it. Drink some water, and take your meds. Survive for another day. There are people here on imgur who are willing to listen if you need to reach out.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Just let me die in peace
item.description: I dodged it for 2.5 years, but it finally caught up with me. Yes, I'm vaxxed. The advice from an unvaccinated family friend who just caught it for like the 4th time: take ivermectin or hydroxychloroquin. /facepalm
item.dc:creator: tinydog

item.title: Seriously. Don't do this.
item.description: Yesterday morning I woke up happily surprised to see that I'd matched online with a woman who I would normally have considered "out of my league". She had even sent a hello message. As far as I can gather, what actually happened was that a friend had got ahold of her phone, and though it would be funny to match her with a guy like me. I don't really know how to explain what it was like when I pieced that together. Don't do this. Edit: For those asking, I'd rather not describe the process of figuring it out. Suffice to say it's not the first time.
item.dc:creator: gratedatasientiste
